MAY 18-21, 2026 AT THE HILTON SAN FRANCISCO UNION SQUARE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA

47th IEEE Symposium on
Security and Privacy

Sponsored by the IEEE Computer Society's Technical Community on Security and Privacy in cooperation with the International Association for Cryptologic Research

Since 1980, the IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy has been the premier forum for presenting developments in computer security and electronic privacy, and for bringing together researchers and practitioners in the field. The 2026 Symposium will mark the 47th annual meeting of this flagship conference.

The Symposium will be held on May 18-20, 2026, and the Security and Privacy Workshops will be held on May 21, 2026. Both events will be in San Francisco, CA at the Hilton San Francisco Union Square.

S&P on LinkedIn

Web Chair Andreas Brüggemann TU Darmstadt
Publicity Chairs Prajwal Panzade Cisco Systems, Inc.
Amit Seal Ami University of South Florida
Student Travel Grants Chair Yupeng Zhang University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
Donations Chair Zhou Li University of California, Irvine
Publications Chairs Shagufta Mehnaz Pennsylvania State University
Berkay Celik Purdue University
Site Chair Maddie Bautista Executivevents, Inc.
General Chair Emeritus Marina Blanton University at Buffalo, The State University of New York
